sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Green bar is Node 8: (44,62)-(63,63)
# Let me first create the plus pattern in green, then click the green bar.

# Current state: (49,29)=N, rest=g
# Plus pattern cells: (49,29), (54,24), (54,34), (59,29)
# Need to click (54,24), (54,34), (59,29) to toggle them to N

# Create plus pattern in green
result = action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 24},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 34},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 59, 'col': 29}
])

# Verify grid
seg = current_frame.segmentation
grid = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 9 and 49 <= min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) <= 59:
        r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        grid[(r,c)] = n['color']

print("Grid after creating plus:")
for r in [49, 54, 59]:
    row = [grid.get((r,c), '?') for c in [24, 29, 34]]
    print(f"  {row}")

# Now click the green bar to submit
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 53, 'col': 62}])
print(f"\nAfter clicking green bar: done={last_action_result.get('done')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
